title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: A pattern for building interactive user interfaces directly in VS Code chat using MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools. MCP tools return data and HTML UI resources which VS Code renders in sandboxed iframes. The UI can call back to the server for live updates. Companies like Shopify and projects like Excalidraw use this approach for checkout flows and interactive diagrams.
